_meta.purpose: Shared prompt-filter baseline. Loaded by app/core/prompt_filters.py and merged with the per-world `prompt_filters` table (world overrides shared by id).

schema.id: stable identifier; world entries with the same id replace the shared one. Doubles as the canonical condition-name: when set as a tag in profile.active_conditions (e.g. via apply_condition), the filter triggers implicitly — no need for a redundant 'condition: condition:<id>' entry.
schema.condition: OPTIONAL extra trigger expression evaluated by app.core.activity_engine.evaluate_condition (e.g. 'stamina<10', 'has_item:foo', 'mood:happy'). Filter triggers when (id-tag is in profile) OR (condition expression evaluates true). Combine via AND/OR/NOT.
schema.label: human-readable description for admin UI
schema.drop_blocks: list of *_block keys to clear from the thought context (block disappears from the prompt)
schema.prompt_modifier: text appended to the effects/state section so the LLM sees the active state
schema.icon: single-emoji badge shown in the character header when the filter matches an active condition
schema.image_modifier: visual hints appended to the image generation prompt (e.g. 'flushed cheeks, glassy eyes')
schema.enabled: if false, the filter is loaded but not applied

filters.label: Drunk — clouded memory
filters.prompt_modifier: You are drunk. Recent conversations feel fuzzy and you can't remember details clearly.
filters.image_modifier: flushed cheeks, glassy eyes, slightly unfocused gaze

filters.label: Exhausted — only home and sleep matter
filters.prompt_modifier: You are exhausted. All you can think about is getting home and sleeping.
filters.image_modifier: tired eyes, drooping shoulders, weary expression
